sep='\n'
for d in ['governance/tasks/pending','governance/handoff','governance/state','governance/reports','governance/codex/proofs','governance/transport']:

pending=Path('governance/tasks/pending/bem763_continue_real_claude_runtime_repair.md')
pending.write_text('# BEM-763 | Continue Real Claude Runtime Repair'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Цель: не останавливаться после checkpoint. Следующий активный шаг — проверить/починить реальный Claude dispatcher runtime proof и Claude mailbox response. Оператор не relay.'+sep)
handoff=Path('governance/handoff/GPT_NEXT_ACTION.md')
handoff.write_text('# GPT NEXT ACTION | BEM-763 ACTIVE REPAIR TASK'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+sep+'Checkpoint guard satisfied. Continue with real Claude runtime repair/proof. Do not stop after reports.'+sep)
state={'schema_version':'next_active_repair_task_after_guard.v1','bem':'BEM-763','status':'next_active_repair_task_created','pending':str(pending),'handoff':str(handoff),'blocker':None,'created_at':created}
state_file=Path('governance/state/bem763_next_active_repair_task_after_guard.json')
state_file.write_text(json.dumps(state,indent=2,ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
report=Path('governance/reports/bem763_next_active_repair_task_after_guard.md')
report.write_text('# BEM-763 | Next Active Repair Task After Guard | PASS'+sep+sep+'Дата: '+created+sep+'Next active repair task created before checkpoint.\nBlocker: null'+sep)
transport=Path('governance/transport/results.jsonl')
with transport.open('a',encoding='utf-8') as h:
    h.write(json.dumps({'record_type':'bem763_next_active_repair_task_after_guard','status':'next_active_repair_task_created','blocker':None,'created_at':created},ensure_ascii=False)+sep)
proof=Path('governance/codex/proofs/bem763_next_active_repair_task_after_guard.txt')
proof.write_text('BEM-763 PASS next active repair task created.\n')
changed_files.extend([str(pending),str(handoff),str(state_file),str(report),str(transport),str(proof)])
ops_applied.append('Created next active repair task before any checkpoint report to satisfy BEM-762 guard')
